section.heading: Relationship to other Federal law

content.p: Nothing in this subchapter shall affect the authority of other appropriate Federal agencies to establish or enforce any requirements which are at least as stringent as those established pursuant to this subchapter.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 94–469, title IV, § 410, as added Pub. L. 102–550, title X, § 1021(a), Oct. 28, 1992, 106 Stat. 3921.)
